chunks.title: get_plugin_traces — Inputs
chunks.text: get_plugin_traces queries Dataverse plug-in trace logs and returns a trimmed summary of recent executions. By default only traces with exceptions from the last 24 hours are returned. Inputs: entity, messageName, onlyErrors, hoursBack (1-168, default 24), top (1-100, default 25).

chunks.title: Claude Desktop setup
chunks.text: Add dataverse-ops to Claude Desktop by editing claude_desktop_config.json: run the server with npx -y @simplesmoothsafe/dataverse-ops-mcp and set DATAVERSE_URL, CLIENT_ID, CLIENT_SECRET and TENANT_ID environment variables for client-credentials auth.

chunks.title: Security — Data handling
chunks.text: The MCP server runs locally over stdio inside your MCP host. All Dataverse data stays on your machine and tenant; the only outbound calls are to Dataverse/Entra and, when a LICENSE_KEY is set, license validation which never carries org data.
